title: Amplified Potion Effects
description: Makes potions stackable. Improves potions to make them useful outside of trade halls
body:
## Main features:
- Stackable potions (up to 16)
- Increased duration or strength for many potions
- Lingering potions have full effects (1/4 in vanilla)
- New potion descriptions

![An example of new description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cccb297c0989a4790dcc24abeabbd78f5a2ac07.png)

## Additional information:
- Datapack affects any vanilla potion in your inventory
- Potions still can be used in recipes
- Datapack uses vanilla translation keys

![An example of translated item tolltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ede819b870389fdae935a69d887880c066cf36ae.png)

**Be careful if you want to use _Amplified Potion Effects_ with other potion datapacks or custom maps. It will replace any non-stackable potion except of ["uncraftable potion"](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Potion#Item_data) (link to Minecraft Wiki).**
